generated_oml:
instance HeatbedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring heatbed temperature, range -55°C to +125°C, accuracy 0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HeatbedTemperatureData
]

instance InternalAirTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal air temperature, range -55°C to +125°C, accuracy 0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalAirTemperatureData
]

instance ExternalAirTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring external air temperature, range -55°C to +125°C, accuracy 0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalAirTemperatureData
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalAirTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalAirTemperatureSensor
]

instance ExternalAirTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalAirTemperatureSensor
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from heatbed sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HeatbedTemperatureData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization
]

instance InternalAirTemperatureDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from internal air sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalAirTemperatureData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization
]

instance ExternalAirTemperatureDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from external air sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalAirTemperatureData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for handling temperature sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance RaspberryPi4Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B as a controller for thermal management"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance ScipyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for non-linear least squares optimization in calibration algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationAlgorithms, DynamicThermalSimulation
]

instance DS18S20Sensors : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensors used for temperature measurement"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance PCBDesign : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB design with MOSFETs and optocouplers for actuation control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for source code management"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationAlgorithms
]

instance OneWireProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire communication protocol for sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with two parameters (C_air, G_box) assuming uniform air temperature and no heatbed heat accumulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with four parameters (C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box) accounting for heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization
]

instance DynamicThermalSimulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal simulation models for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithms : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms for parameter estimation using non-linear least squares"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterEstimationInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring for safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationAlert, AdjustHeatbedPower, AdjustFanSpeed
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from dynamic thermal simulation"
]

instance ParameterEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated parameters from calibration algorithms"
]

instance SafetyViolationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety violation alert for temperature deviations beyond UL/LL limits"
]

instance OperationalAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational adjustments based on monitoring outputs"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detected based on sensor data anomalies"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated system state based on sensor data"
]

instance AdjustHeatbedPower : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust heatbed power to maintain temperature within safe limits"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust fan speed to regulate internal temperature"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed for thermal incubator, 214×214×3 mm, controlled via MOSFETs for 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan for thermal incubator, 12V/24V operation, 0.02 m³/s airflow"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for thermal management"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for actuation control"
]

instance StyrofoamBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated box with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system environment"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPi4, PCB, StyrofoamBox, HeatbedTemperatureSensor, InternalAirTemperatureSensor, ExternalAirTemperatureSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed) sent from controller to low-level driver via RabbitMQ. Commands trigger actuation of MOSFET-controlled heatbed and fan through Raspberry Pi GPIO."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Synchronization occurs via RabbitMQ with periodic temperature data reading by the low-level driver; specific time intervals not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server (hosted on Raspberry Pi) orchestrates communication between low-level driver (PT interface), controller (control logic), and simulation models (DT). Data flows via RabbitMQ topics between PT components and DT services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, as the DT integrates models and data from the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring and prediction."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validation through uniform temperature experiments (testing Assumption 1), calibration using least squares minimization of residual error between model predictions and experimental data. Error analysis via sensor measurements at multiple positions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ protocol for message-based communication between PT (low-level driver) and DT (controller, models). Raspberry Pi hosts RabbitMQ server for message routing."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All DT components (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver) deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B. Physical PT components connected via GPIO and PCB."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates safe protocol to maintain device safety during operation. Bang-bang controller prevents overheating by enforcing temperature limits (UL/LL) and controlled heating/waiting durations (H/C parameters)."
]
